start.title: Welcome to Homarr
start.subtitle: Let's start setting your Homarr instance up.
start.description: To get started, please select how you want to continue.

action.importOldmarr: Import from a Homarr version before v1.0

import.title: Import data
import.subtitle: You can import data from an existing Homarr instance.

dropzone.description: The ZIP file you uploaded will be processed and you will be able to select what you would like to import

boardSelection.description: Choose all the boards with the size you want to import

summary.title: Import summary
summary.description: In the summary below, you can see what will be imported

token.description: Enter the import token shown in your previous Homarr instance

name.description: The name needs to match the admin group of your external provider

mobileBoard.label: Mobile board

admin.label: Administrator
admin.description: Members who have this permission will have full access to all features and settings

use-all.label: Use all applications
use-all.description: Allow members to add any applications to their boards

full-all.label: Full application access
full-all.description: Allow members to use, manage, and delete any application

view-all.label: View all boards
view-all.description: Allow members to view all boards

modify-all.label: Modify all boards
modify-all.description: Allow members to modify all boards (This does not include access control and danger zones)

full-all.label: Full board access
full-all.description: Allow members to view, modify, and delete all boards (This includes access control and danger zones)

use-all.label: Use all integrations
use-all.description: Allow members to add any integrations to their boards

interact-all.label: Interact with any integration
interact-all.description: Allow members to interact with any integration

full-all.label: Full integration access
full-all.description: Allow members to use, manage, and interact with any integrations

upload.label: Upload media content

view-all.label: View all media content
view-all.description: Allow members to view all media content

full-all.label: Full media access
full-all.description: Allow members to manage and delete any media content

create.label: Create search engine
create.description: Allow members to create search engines

modify-all.label: Modify all existing search engines
modify-all.description: Allow members to modify all existing search engines

full-all.label: Full search engine access
full-all.description: Allow members to manage and delete any search engine

action.create: Test the connection and create integration

unknown.title: Unknown error
unknown.description: An unknown error occurred, open the cause below to see more details

parse.title: Parse error
parse.description: The response could not be parsed. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the service.

authorization.title: Authorisation error
authorization.description: The request was not authorised. Please verify that the credentials are correct and you have them configured with enough permissions.

statusCode.title: Response error
statusCode.description: Received unexpected {statusCode} ({reason}) response from <url></url>. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the integration.
statusCode.otherDescription: Received unexpected {statusCode} response from <url></url>. Please verify that the URL is pointing to the base URL of the integration.

description.notYetValid: The certificate is not yet valid.
description.hostnameMismatch: The certificate hostname does not match the URL.

permission.title: Not enough permissions
permission.message: You are not allowed to trust or upload certificates. Please contact your administrator to upload the necessary root certificate.

hostnameMismatch.title: Hostname mismatch
hostnameMismatch.message: The hostname in the certificate does not match the hostname you are connecting to. This could indicate a security risk, but you can still choose to trust this certificate.

extract.title: CA certificate extraction failed
extract.message: Only self-signed certificates without a chain can be fetched automatically. If you are using a self-signed certificate, please make sure to upload the CA certificate manually. You can find instructions on how to do this <docsLink></docsLink>.

confirm.title: Trust hostname mismatch
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to trust the certificate with a hostname mismatch?

success.title: Trusted certificate
success.message: Added hostname to trusted certificate list

error.title: Failed to trust certificate
error.message: The certificate with a hostname mismatch could not be trusted

confirm.title: Trust self-signed certificate
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to trust this self-signed certificate?

success.title: Trusted certificate
success.message: Added certificate to trusted certificate list

error.title: Failed to trust certificate
error.message: Failed to add certificate to trusted certificate list

details.title: Details
details.description: Review the certificate information before deciding to trust it.

connection.hostUnreachable: The server could not be reached. This usually means the host is offline or unreachable from your network.
connection.networkUnreachable: The network is unreachable. Please check your Internet connection or network configuration.
connection.refused: The server refused the connection. It may not be running or is rejecting requests on the specified port.
connection.reset: The connection was unexpectedly closed by the server. This can happen if the server is unstable or restarted.

dns.notFound: The server address could not be found. Please check the URL for typos or invalid domain names.
dns.timeout: DNS lookup timed out. This may be a temporary issue—please try again in a few moments.
dns.noAnswer: The DNS server didn't return a valid response. The domain may exist but has no valid records.

timeout.aborted: The request was aborted before it could complete. This might be due to a user action or system timeout.
timeout.timeout: The request took too long to complete and was timed out. Check your network or try again later.

testConnection.alertNotice: The save button is enabled once the connection is successfully established

success.title: Connection successful
success.message: The connection has been successfully established

invalidCredentials.title: Invalid credentials
invalidCredentials.message: The credentials you provided are invalid

commonError.title: Connection failed
commonError.message: The connection was unable to be established

unauthorized.title: Unauthorised
unauthorized.message: The credentials provided were unauthorized. Please double-check what you entered

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.message: The server was forbidden to connect. Please double-check the permissions

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.message: The URL provided did not return anything. Please double-check the URL

internalServerError.title: Internal server error
internalServerError.message: The server encountered an error. Please try again later

serviceUnavailable.title: Service unavailable
serviceUnavailable.message: The server is currently unavailable. Please try again later

connectionAborted.title: Connection aborted
connectionAborted.message: The connection was aborted. Please try again later

domainNotFound.title: Domain not found
domainNotFound.message: The domain was not found. Please try again later

connectionRefused.title: Connection refused
connectionRefused.message: The server was refused connection. Please try again later

invalidJson.title: Invalid JSON
invalidJson.message: The connection's response provided invalid JSON. Please try again later

wrongPath.title: Wrong path
wrongPath.message: The path is incorrect. Please double-check the URL

tooManyRequests.title: Too many requests in a given time
tooManyRequests.message: There were too many requests. You are likely being rate-limited or rejected by the target system
